positive: A stylized, symmetrical depiction of a majestic forest owl perched on a glowing branch, rendered in intricate dot-work and linework. The owl is facing forward in a vigilant, poised posture. The composition should use strong black ink silhouettes against a vibrant, abstract background gradient of deep sapphire blue and twilight lavender. Incorporate hidden elements like swirling constellations and delicate vine patterns framing the main subject. High contrast, graphic novel aesthetic, woodcut engraving style, minimal shading, vector-art quality, perfect for repeating apparel pattern or central chest print.
